top_rejection_reason: relative volume below REL_VOL_MIN 1.5 (23/25); secondary: MACD histogram not rising and EMA-9 <= EMA-21 (consolidating, not breaking out)

notes.notes: No open positions at midday (positions.json empty), so Parts 3-4 skipped. Pre-flight clean: equity ~$99,997, day P&L -$5.24 (-0.01%), well clear of the -2% kill-switch; no kill_switch/no_trade flags; VIX 16.39; SPY trending up (regime cap = 10). Re-considered entries inside the window (12:35 ET, before 1:00 PM cutoff). Recomputed fresh indicators for all 25 watchlist names and ran the full 7-criteria gate: ZERO passed, same as the 10:00 run. Binding constraint remains rel_vol < 1.5 on 24/25 (cumulative IEX 5-min volume / 20d avg daily vol reads structurally low on the free feed). Only MCY (rel_vol 2.37) and MBUU (4.76) cleared volume but both are in downtrends (EMA9<EMA21, RSI 28/50, MACD falling) — pullbacks, not breakouts, correctly skipped. Per the midday guidance the entry bar should be higher than at open; nothing met it. Zero forced entries — conservative correct outcome. Still bootstrap phase, 0 completed trades.

notes.summary: Fixed two issues in the entry-signal engine. (1) Bar fetch (scripts/compute_indicators.py fetch_5min_bars + fetch_daily_bars) was passing Alpaca's `limit`, which returns the OLDEST bars in the window — so RSI/EMA/MACD/EMA-200 and watchlist `close` were computed off days-stale bars (NVDA was on last Friday's data). Now end-anchored: fetches the full window / tails the dailies, so indicators use current bars. (2) rel_vol redefined as time-of-day RVOL (lib/indicators.time_of_day_rvol): today's cumulative volume vs the average cumulative volume up to the same time of day over the prior RVOL_LOOKBACK_DAYS (14) sessions — feed-agnostic, fixing the structurally-low IEX readings that were the binding constraint rejecting ~23/25 names. Verified live: NVDA 1.08, AAPL 1.52, MBUU 1.72, MCY 0.12 (vs old broken 0.196 / 2.37). VWAP now resets per session. Added config INDICATOR_INTRADAY_LOOKBACK_DAYS=20, RVOL_LOOKBACK_DAYS=14. Legacy compute_relative_volume / apply_all_intraday signatures kept for back-compat; all 36 tests pass. No trade decisions made this run.
